title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US dominates AI chips, models, and applications but faces disadvantages in power infrastructure for data centers compared to China. The difference stems from fragmented US governance across jurisdictions versus China's centralized NDRC/NEA mandate, affecting transmission lines, grid access, and hyperscaler buildout. US tech companies work around constraints via behind-the-meter deals and off-grid plants, while China leverages 25,000+ miles of UHV lines and its Eastern Data Western Compute strategy.
